name: Custom Safe Programs Example
description: Example of user-maintained safe programs list - add your trusted programs here

programs.name: Jupiter Aggregator v6
programs.description: Jupiter swap aggregator - widely used and audited DEX aggregator

notes: This is an EXAMPLE file showing how to create a custom safe programs list
Copy this file and modify it to include YOUR trusted programs
The custom list will be MERGED with the default safe programs
Only add programs you trust - this affects risk calculations
Verify program addresses on Solana explorers before adding
